description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish dinosaur or reptile, with a rounded body and short limbs. The toy features a large, elongated snout and a wide mouth, with small, rounded eyes set high on the head. Its back is adorned with a row of triangular spikes, and the tail is thick and tapers to a point. The arms and legs are short and stubby, with the hands and feet slightly darker in color, suggesting claws or paw pads. The overall surface appears soft and matte, with minimal detailing, giving it a cuddly and approachable appearance.
description: A soft, cartoon-style dinosaur stuffed toy with a rounded body, spiked back, and short limbs. The toy has a large snout, wide mouth, and contrasting dark hands and feet.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the broad back, row of triangular spikes, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated snout, open mouth, and the profile of the spikes and tail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide mouth, rounded snout, and both arms and legs with dark accents.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the snout, mouth, and the curve of the tail and spikes.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a wide, slightly open mouth and small, rounded eyes. There are no visible eyebrows or other expressive features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms slightly extended forward and legs bent at the knees, tail resting on the ground behind.
